Support Center

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our financing solutions, eligibility criteria, and application process. Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is here to help.

Help & Support

Frequently Asked Questions

Find quick answers to common questions about Capital Hub services.

We offer a comprehensive range of financial solutions tailored to your business needs. This includes short-term options such as factoring and working capital lines, medium and long-term solutions like equipment leasing and investment loans, as well as access to non-reimbursable funds (EU grants, PNRR) and alternative financing through fintech and private investors.
Eligibility varies depending on the specific financial product. Generally, for bank financing, we look for companies with at least 12 months of activity and positive financial results. However, for startups and early-stage companies, we have specific solutions such as grants, micro-credits, or angel investment opportunities, which have different criteria focused on innovation and growth potential.
The duration depends on the complexity of the application and the type of financing. Simple working capital lines or factoring can often be arranged in 1-2 weeks. More complex investment loans or EU grant applications can take 1-3 months. Our role is to accelerate this process by ensuring all documentation is perfect before submission.
We believe in success-based partnerships. For most brokerage services, our fees are success-based, meaning we get paid only when you secure financing. For complex consulting projects requiring extensive preparation (such as EU grants or business restructuring), we may have a transparent fee structure that includes a small upfront payment, which will be clearly discussed from the outset.
Yes, absolutely. Often, applications are rejected due to incomplete documentation or poor presentation, rather than the actual viability of the business. We conduct an in-depth diagnosis of your financial health, identify the reasons for rejection, and help restructure your application or find alternative financing partners better suited to your risk profile.
We are industry-agnostic and have successfully helped clients from Manufacturing, Construction, IT & Tech, Retail, Transportation, and Agriculture. Our team includes specialists who understand the specific financial cycles and capital needs of different market sectors.

Still have questions?

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our financial experts are available to discuss and guide you to the right solution.

CAPITAL HUB

Professional financing solutions for companies looking to grow sustainably and efficiently.
